span.p:
📝 Note: The user interacts with the Gradio UI,
which sends requests to the FastAPI backend.
The backend processes these requests using
the selected LLM and returns the responses.

div.style: color: rgb(146, 64, 14) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📝 Note: The update process can be triggered
manually or automatically. It fetches the latest
documentation, processes it, and updates the
FAISS index to keep the knowledge base current.
